steps.title: Spot the hidden contrast
steps.content: The geyser appears “inhospitable to life” in the opening, but Boyd's quote reveals it's “almost like a cradle for biodiversity.” The transition must show this contradiction.

steps.title: Match the contrast to the correct word
steps.content: Still means “nevertheless”—the word that shows the geyser's inhospitable appearance contradicts the reality of its biodiversity. The other three suggest logical consequence, narrowing, or restatement—none express contradiction. That matches choice C — C is correct.
